description.zh-CN: 年末需要完成下一年度的配置导入。导入时会校验：① 不能父级组织和子级组织同时勾选 ② 同一个管理组织需保持勾选结果一致
description.en-US: At the end of the year, the configuration import for the next year needs to be completed. During the import, the following checks will be performed: ① The parent organization and its subordinate organizations cannot be selected at the same time. ② The same management organization must have consistent selection results.
